name: cli-session-crash-recovery-clearing
description: clear_persisted_sessions() (mirrored in copilot_cli_llm.py) wipes the on-disk session store and in-memory instances at the top of every run_batch_once pass. A killed run — or simply a prior poll cycle in continuous mode — leaves a CLI-side session history ahead of BeeAI's always-fresh in-memory RequirementAgentRunState: the manager's session 'remembers' a completed flow_runner call, tries to skip to log_capturer, and gets structurally rejected by ConditionalRequirement with no clean recovery. Clearing is chosen over reconciling the two states on the fly.
invariants: Both CLI providers must be cleared per batch pass, not just at process startup — the cache otherwise survives poll cycles within one process
